Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests

Class ProofTreeTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests.AbstractProofTreeTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests.ProofTreeTests
All Implemented Interfaces:
IProofTreeChangedListener
Direct Known Subclasses:
RewriteHypActionTacticTest
public class ProofTreeTests extends AbstractProofTreeTests
Unit tests for classes ProofTree and ProofTreeNode: basic manipulations of proof trees.
